**Determining strike announcement**

I need to confirm if this document is announcing an upcoming strike. The title indicates there will be a strike of regional trains on Thursday, December 14, from 9 AM to 5 PM, proclaimed by some union. The date context shows it’s referencing Tuesday, December 12, 2023. The text details that this strike has been planned and may cause disruptions. So, it looks like this is indeed an announcement of an upcoming strike for December 14. I should mark isStrike as true. I also need to extract strike data with the correct dates and location information.
